heroHeadline: Russia Declares Luhansk 'Liberated'; Ukraine Strikes Bryansk Missile Factory; 1,300 Losses on Day 1,498
heroSubtitle: Russia's MoD formally declares Luhansk Oblast 'liberated' (Ukraine held 0.2%); Ukrainian forces struck a 'Strela' cruise missile component factory in Bryansk as their deep-strike campaign extends into defense-industrial targets; Russian drones hit Chuhuiv residential building and struck Dnipropetrovsk Oblast 10+ times (1 killed); cumulative Russian losses reach ~1,300,030 on Day 1,498; Easter ceasefire negotiations stalled — Russia rejected Zelensky's proposals and continued strikes; Zelensky described April 1 talks with US envoys Witkoff, Kushner, NATO chief Rutte, and Sen. Graham as 'positive'; Fortress Belt fighting continues on Sloviansk-Kostiantynivka axis
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
